title: neolitsea pubescens
intro: Neolitsea pubescens, also known as the Chinese litsea, is a plant species belonging to the family Lauraceae, native to China and Southeast Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Neolitsea pubescens include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and supporting the immune system. Neolitsea pubescens can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or extract, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
